---
title: "Featured Posts"
subtitle: ""
page-layout: full
css: custom.css
---

<!-- Academic Icons -->
{{< include /files/includes/_academic.qmd >}}


**🏆 Lester R. Curtin Award — American Statistical Association (2025)**  
Emmanuel Kubuafor received the ASA’s *Lester R. Curtin Award* at the 2025 Joint Statistical Meetings in Nashville.  
The award supports promising early-career health statisticians in attending professional conferences and advancing methodological skills.  
[Read the UNM announcement](https://math.unm.edu/news-events/news/dennis-baidoo-emmanuel-kubuafor-receive-%C2%A0lester-r-curtin-award){.colored-link} · [About the award](https://www.amstat.org/your-career/awards/lester-r-curtin-award){.colored-link}

---


**🎓 Campersand: Math Summer Camp at UNM (2024)**  
As a counselor at UNM’s annual *Campersand Math Camp*, Emmanuel helped mentor over 100 middle- and high-school students in math, logic, and computing.  
The program fosters mathematical curiosity and teamwork through engaging, project-based learning.  
[Read more](https://math.unm.edu/news-events/news/campersand-math-summer-camp-smlc-0){.colored-link}

**🤝 ASA Diversity Mentoring Program (2025)**  
Featured in *Amstat News*’s “Stats from the Road” series, Emmanuel shared his experience with the ASA Diversity Mentoring Program (DMP), which connects early-career statisticians from underrepresented backgrounds with professional mentors.  
He described the program as “an eye-opener… very informative and resourceful.”  
[Read the article](https://magazine.amstat.org/blog/2025/05/01/stats-from-the-road-dmp/){.colored-link}

---

<small>*Updated November 2025*</small>
